common.dataUnavailable: Ba'zi jonli turizm ma'lumotlari vaqtincha mavjud emas.
common.routeGeneratedNote: Ushbu marshrut tanlangan manzil va qiziqishlar asosida tuzildi.
common.placeDescriptionFallback: Keyingi Baramiz marshrutingiz uchun yaxshi manzil varianti.

footer.description: Qoraqalpog'iston uchun yaratilgan, musobaqa taqdimoti uchun jilolangan turizm kashfiyot platformasi.

categoryDescriptions.history: Hudud tarixini ochib beradigan qal'alar, xotira yo'nalishlari va joylar.
categoryDescriptions.culture: Manzilni jonlantiradigan teatrlar, jamoat joylari va mahalliy an'analar.
categoryDescriptions.museum: Sayohatga mazmun va ishonch beradigan muzey bekatlari.
categoryDescriptions.nature: Ochiq manzaralar, uzoq nuqtalar va chiroyli sayohat lahzalari.
categoryDescriptions.adventure: Qal'a yo'nalishlari, road triplar va keskin relyef bo'ylab faol harakat.
categoryDescriptions.food: Marshrutni yanada insoniy qiladigan bozorlar va milliy taomlar.
categoryDescriptions.family: Birgalikdagi sayohat uchun qulay va amaliy joylar.

hero.title: Qoraqalpog'istonni haqiqiy sayohat platformasidek kashf eting
hero.description: Manzillarni kashf eting, diqqatga sazovor joylarni ko'ring, turizm xizmatlarini toping va Baramiz'dan amaliy marshrut rejalash qatlami sifatida foydalaning.

featuredDestinations.title: Texnik forma emas, lokatsiyadan boshlang
featuredDestinations.description: Har bir manzil sahifasi joylar, xizmatlar, taomlar va rejalashni bitta qulay sayohat tajribasiga birlashtiradi.

themes.title: Kashfiyot uchun tezkor toifalar
themes.description: Joylar katalogi va manzil sahifalariga tez kirish nuqtasi sifatida backenddagi jonli toifalardan foydalaning.

featuredPlaces.title: Backenddan keladigan jonli joylar
featuredPlaces.description: Baramiz tavsiya etilgan manzillar uchun haqiqiy joylar API'sidan foydalanadi va rasm xatolarini chiroyli tarzda boshqaradi.
featuredPlaces.empty: Backend ma'lumot yuborganda tavsiya etilgan joylar shu yerda ko'rinadi.

services.title: Mahsulotni haqiqiy his qildiradigan xizmat qatlami
services.description: MVP uchun statik demo xizmatlar yetarli, ammo ular manzil kashfiyoti bilan uyg'un ko'rinishi kerak.

errors.dataUnavailable: Ba'zi jonli turizm ma'lumotlari vaqtincha mavjud emas, lekin asosiy kashfiyot oqimi tayyor.

hero.title: Qoraqalpog?iston bo?ylab ishonchli sayohatlarni manzillar, xizmatlar va amaliy marshrutlar bilan bir platformada rejalang
hero.description: Baramiz sayohatchini qiziqishdan amaliy harakatga olib o?tadi: manzilni oching, haqiqiy joylarni ko?ring, mahalliy yordamni toping va foydalanish mumkin bo?lgan marshrut tuzing.

quickBuilder.title: Avval manzilni tanlang, keyin joylar yoki marshrutga o?ting
quickBuilder.description: Dastlab manzilni tanlang, kerak bo?lsa qiziqishni qo?shing va sayohatchiga mos bo?lgan oqimga o?ting.
quickBuilder.interestsHelp: Agar sayohatchining ustuvor yo?nalishi aniq bo?lsa, bitta qiziqishni qo?shing. Faqat manzildan boshlash uchun bo?sh qoldirish ham mumkin.
quickBuilder.summaryText: Kontekst uchun manzil sahifasini oching, mos joylarni ko?ring yoki to?g?ridan-to?g?ri marshrut tuzishga o?ting.

destinations.title: Hududdagi eng kuchli sayohat hikoyalarini beradigan manzillar
destinations.description: Odamlar avval tanlaydigan manzillardan boshlang, so?ng joylar, xizmatlar va marshrut rejalashga chuqurlashing.

places.title: Platformani darhol foydali qiladigan haqiqiy joylar
places.description: Tavsiya etilgan diqqatga sazovor joylar backenddan yuklanadi, shu sabab bosh sahifa haqiqiy turizm kontentiga tayanadi.
places.empty: Backend ma?lumot yuborganda tavsiya etilgan joylar shu yerda ko?rinadi.

services.title: Kashfiyotdan haqiqiy sayohatga olib o?tadigan yordamchi xizmatlar
services.description: Turar joy, agentliklar va transport erta ko?rinadi, shuning uchun platforma reklama emas, amaliy mahsulotdek seziladi.

guides.title: Mahalliy bilim sayohat oqimining ichida qoladi
guides.description: Gid profillari madaniy kontekst, logistika ishonchi va hududiy tajribani kuchaytiradi.

why.title: Haqiqiy turizm qarorlari uchun tuzilgan mahsulot tuzilmasi
why.description: Baramiz manzil kashfiyoti, mahalliy xizmatlar va marshrut rejalash atrofida qurilgan, shu sabab keyingi qadam har doim aniq bo?ladi.
why.planningTitle: Abstrakt AI emas, amaliy marshrut rejalash
why.planningDescription: Marshrut tuzish manzil va qiziqishlardan boshlanadi, keyin foydali natijaga olib boradi.
why.localDescription: Nukus, Moynaq, qal?a yo?nalishlari, muzeylar va uzoq manzaralar mahsulot markazida qoladi.
why.platformTitle: Tarqoq sahifalar emas, bitta platforma oqimi
why.platformDescription: Joylar, xizmatlar, gidlar va marshrutlar bitta tajribada yashaydi, shu sabab mahsulot yaxlit ko?rinadi.

route.title: Marshrut rejalash mahsulotni almashtirmaydi, uni kuchaytiradi
route.description: Marshrut tuzish kuchli funksiya bo?lib qoladi, lekin u manzil konteksti va haqiqiy sayohatchi ustuvorliklaridan boshlanadi.

steps.destinationDescription: Sayohatchining haqiqiy yo?liga mos bo?lgan Nukus, Moynaq, Ellikqala yoki boshqa manzilni tanlang.
steps.interestsDescription: Marshrut umumiy emas, foydali bo?lishi uchun muzey, tarix, tabiat, taom va mahalliy madaniyatni aralashtiring.
steps.resultDescription: Natijani oching, bekatlarni ko?ring va xarita navigatsiyasi, joylar hamda turizm xizmatlariga o?ting.

trust.title: Hududiy identitet umumiy turizm kontentiga singib ketmaydi
trust.description: Qoraqalpog?iston turizm platformasi uchun mahalliy kontekst dizayn sifati kabi muhim.
trust.regionTitle: Sayohatchilar so?raydigan manzillar asos qilib olingan
trust.regionDescription: Bosh sahifa odamlar avval qidiradigan joylardan boshlanadi: Nukus, Moynaq, Ellikqala, Orol dengizi hududi va Ustyurt yo?nalishlari.
trust.cultureTitle: Madaniyat va meros asosiy oqimda qoladi
trust.cultureDescription: Muzeylar, meros yo?nalishlari, mahalliy gidlar va madaniy kontekst chetga chiqmaydi.
trust.operationDescription: Jonli joylar, manzil sahifalari, xizmatlar va marshrut rejalash birga ishlaydi, shu sabab mahsulot hakamlar va hamkorlar oldida ishonchli ko?rinadi.

finalCta.title: Manzilni tanlang, joylarni ko?ring va uni marshrutga aylantiring
finalCta.description: Baramiz foydalanuvchi kashfiyotdan marshrut rejalashga tabiiy o?tganda eng yaxshi ishlaydi. Eng muhim manzildan boshlang va tajribani haqiqiy turizm kontekstida saqlang.
finalCta.summary: Hozir marshrut tuzishga o?ting yoki ko?proq kontekst uchun avval manzil sahifasini oching.

categories.defaultDescription: Marshrut tuzish va manzil sahifalarini amaliy saqlashga yordam beradigan aniq sayohat qiziqishi.

errors.dataUnavailable: Ba?zi jonli turizm ma?lumotlari vaqtincha mavjud emas, lekin asosiy kashfiyot oqimi ishlashda davom etadi.

hero.title: Qoraqalpog'istonni manzil hikoyasi orqali ko'ring
hero.description: Har bir manzil diqqatga sazovor joylar, turizm xizmatlari, tajribalar va marshrut tuzishga qulay o'tishni birlashtiradi. Shu sabab mahsulot avval kashfiyotga, keyin amaliy rejalashga xizmat qiladi.

section.title: Qoraqalpog'istonning qaysi qismini kashf etishni tanlang
section.description: Ushbu to'rtta asosiy manzil joriy MVP'dagi eng kuchli kashfiyot hikoyalarini qamrab oladi.

errors.countsUnavailable: Manzil sonlari vaqtincha mavjud emas, lekin manzil sahifalarini ochish mumkin.

notFound.title: Manzil topilmadi
notFound.description: Bu manzil joriy MVP konfiguratsiyasida mavjud emas.

errors.attractionsUnavailable: Bu manzil uchun joylar vaqtincha mavjud emas.

attractions.title: {{name}}da nimalarni ko'rish mumkin
attractions.description: Backend API'dan keladigan jonli joy kartalari, shahar yoki hudud mantiqi bo'yicha filtrlangan.
attractions.empty: Hozirgi qiziqish filtri bo'yicha joylar topilmadi.

experiences.title: Faoliyatlar va sayohat kayfiyati
experiences.description: Jonli joy toifalaridan olinadi, shu sabab manzil sahifasi oddiy ro'yxatdan kengroq ko'rinadi.
experiences.defaultDescription: Ushbu manzil uchun tematik tajriba qatlami.

experienceDescriptions.history: Qal'alar, yodgorliklar va manzil ortidagi uzoq tarixni o'rganing.
experienceDescriptions.culture: Mahalliy sayohatni jonlantiradigan teatrlar, bozorlar va madaniy makonlarni kashf eting.
experienceDescriptions.museum: Muzey bekatlari kashfiyot yo'nalishiga mazmun va tuzilma qo'shadi.
experienceDescriptions.nature: Keng manzaralar va ochiq makon uchun tabiatga yo'naltirilgan sayohat.
experienceDescriptions.food: Manzilni to'liqroq his qilish uchun milliy taomlar va bozor lahzalarini qo'shing.
experienceDescriptions.adventure: Harakat va manzara izlaydigan mehmonlar uchun uzoq yo'llar va ochiq havoda sayohat.

accommodation.title: Qayerda qolish mumkin
accommodation.description: Bu yerda statik demo kartalar qabul qilinadi, chunki maqsad platformani haqiqiy turizm mahsulotidek his qildirishdir.

tours.title: Marshrut uchun mahalliy yordam
tours.description: Statik demo takliflar sahifani shunchaki ma'lumot bazasi emas, balki manzil xabiga aylantiradi.

food.title: Restoranlar va mahalliy ta'mlar
food.description: Ovqat kartalari manzil hikoyasini to'ldiradi va kashfiyot oqimini yanada amaliy qiladi.

finalCta.title: {{name}} uchun aqlli marshrut tuzing
finalCta.description: Bu manzilni asos qilib, qiziqishlaringizni tanlang va xaritaga tayyor bekatlarga ega amaliy marshrut oling.

hero.title: Qoraqalpog'iston bo'ylab joylarni ko'ring
hero.description: Manzil va toifa bo'yicha filtrlang, so'ng manzil sahifalariga o'ting yoki marshrut rejalash oqimiga bekat qo'shing.

errors.dataUnavailable: Ba'zi jonli joy ma'lumotlari hozir mavjud emas.

results.title: Ko'rishga tayyor {{count}} ta joy
results.description: Katta manzil kartalari joylar brauzerini texnik ro'yxat emas, foydali vizual tajribaga aylantiradi.

hero.title: To'liqroq sayohat platformasi uchun turizm xizmatlari
hero.description: Bu bo'limlar MVP uchun statik demo kontent, ammo ular Baramiz'ni manzil kashfiyoti ustiga qurilgan haqiqiy turizm xizmati sifatida his qildiradi.

agencies.title: Tur agentliklari
agencies.description: Paket turlar, kunlik sayohatlar va hududiy mehmon yordami uchun demo operator kartalari.

items.title: Baramiz Local Tours
items.description: City routes, museum visits, and day-trip packaging for travelers starting in Nukus.

items.title: Aral Horizon Travel
items.description: A remote-region operator concept focused on Moynaq, the Aral Sea narrative, and scenic routes.

guides.title: Gidlar
guides.description: Tarix, madaniyat va uzoq manzillar hikoyalari uchun mahalliy gid profillari.

items.title: Heritage storyteller guide
items.description: Designed for travelers who want monuments, museums, and strong regional context.

items.title: Adventure route guide
items.description: A guide profile for fortress circuits, desert drives, and outdoor-focused day plans.

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: Shaharlar va uzoq joylar o'rtasida harakatlanadigan mehmonlar uchun amaliy transport variantlari.

items.title: City transfer service
items.description: Airport, hotel, and attraction transfers for visitors based in Nukus.

items.title: Regional driver support
items.description: Longer-distance transport for Ellikqala, Moynaq, and the Aral Sea region.

accommodation.title: Turar joy
accommodation.description: Shahar tanaffuslari va road triplar uchun sodda, ammo jozibali turar joy variantlari.

items.title: Boutique city stay
items.description: Comfortable accommodation concept for travelers focusing on museums and city exploration.

items.title: Explorer lodge
items.description: A more flexible regional stay format for nature and road-trip travelers.

experiences.title: Madaniy tajribalar
experiences.description: Platformani shunchaki joylar ro'yxati emas, to'liq turizm qatlami sifatida his qildiradigan qo'shimcha tajribalar.

items.title: Traditional music evening
items.description: A cultural showcase concept for visitors who want more than a sightseeing list.

items.title: Cuisine and market experience
items.description: A more hands-on food and market route built around local flavor and atmosphere.

hero.title: Marshrutingizni tuzing
hero.description: Manzil va qiziqishlarni tanlang, Baramiz sizga darhol foydalanish mumkin bo'lgan amaliy marshrutni qaytaradi.

form.title: Aniq sayohat marshrutini tuzing
form.description: Manzil va qiziqishlarni tanlang. Natija sahifasida o'qish oson bo'lgan sayohat rejasi ko'rsatiladi.

errors.generateFailed: Hozir marshrutni yaratib bo'lmadi. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.

3_hours.label: 3 soat
3_hours.helper: Shahar markazidagi asosiy joylar uchun qisqa marshrut.

half_day.label: Yarim kun
half_day.helper: Yarim kunlik kashfiyot uchun muvozanatli marshrut.

1_day.label: 1 kun
1_day.helper: Ko'proq bekatlar va xilma-xillik bilan to'liq kunlik marshrut.

empty.title: Marshrutingiz shu yerda ko'rinadi
empty.description: Manzil va qiziqishlarni tanlagandan so'ng Marshrut tuzish sahifasidan marshrut yarating.

hero.title: Siz uchun tavsiya etilgan marshrut
hero.description: Bu marshrut tanlangan manzil va qiziqishlarni o'qish oson bo'lgan sayohat rejasiga aylantiradi.

summary.title: Sayohatingiz - {{city}}
summary.description: Joylar va xizmatlarni davom ettirib o'rganishingiz uchun tez ko'rib chiqiladigan, darhol navigatsiyaga o'tkaziladigan amaliy marshrut rejasi.

itinerary.title: Tavsiya etilgan sayohat rejasi
itinerary.description: Har bir tavsiya uchun vaqt, vizual va izoh bilan puxta ketma-ket bekatlar.
itinerary.empty: Marshrut tayyor, ammo hozircha bekatlar qaytmadi.

map.title: Marshrut yo'li xaritada
map.description: Joy koordinatalari mavjud bo'lsa, Baramiz navigatsiyadan oldin marshrut ketma-ketligini xaritada ko'rsatadi.
map.error: Hozir joy ma'lumotlari yuklanmagani sababli xarita ko'rinishini chiqarib bo'lmadi.
map.empty: Hozircha marshrut koordinatalari yo'q, lekin marshrut rejangiz tayyor.

plan.title: Marshrut rejasi
plan.description: Bekatlarni ko'rib chiqing, nuqtani tanlang va xarita shu joyga fokuslanadi.

mapPanel.title: Xarita va navigatsiya
mapPanel.description: Markerlar marshrut bekatlarini ko'rsatadi. Xaritani fokuslash uchun rejadan joy tanlang.

hero.title: Joylarni xaritada ko'ring va sayohat yo'lingizni tuzing
hero.description: Kashfiyot rejimi va tanlangan marshrut rejimi o'rtasida almashing. Joylarni tanlang, masofani ko'ring va Google Maps yoki Yandex Mapsda navigatsiyani oching.

errors.partial: Ba'zi jonli ma'lumotlar yuklanmadi. Mavjud joylar va navigatsiya vositalari bilan ishlash davom etadi.

empty.title: Koordinatali joylar topilmadi
empty.description: Boshqa shahar yoki toifa filtri bilan urinib ko'ring. Koordinatasiz joylar kartalarda ko'rinadi, lekin xaritaga pin qilib bo'lmaydi.

sidebar.routeEmpty: Marshrut yo'lini yaratish uchun xaritadan joylarni tanlang.
sidebar.exploreEmpty: Bu filtrda xarita uchun tayyor joy topilmadi. Boshqa shahar yoki toifani sinab ko'ring.

nukus.name: Nukus
nukus.summary: Qoraqalpog'istonga qulay kirish nuqtasi: muzeylar, madaniy obidalar, mahalliy bozorlar va shahar kashfiyoti.
nukus.overview: Nukus san'at, muzeylar, taomlar va kengroq hududni o'rganish uchun ishonchli baza istaydigan sayohatchilar uchun asosiy madaniy darvoza.

stays.title: Savitsky View Hotel
stays.description: A polished city stay concept near museums and cultural attractions, ideal for first-time visitors.

stays.title: Aral Gate Residence
stays.description: Comfortable rooms, business-friendly service, and easy transfers for travelers using Nukus as a base.

guides.title: City culture guide
guides.description: A local guide concept focused on museums, markets, and cultural storytelling in Nukus.

guides.title: Art and heritage companion
guides.description: Designed for visitors who want a deeper explanation of the city's creative and historical significance.

food.title: Traditional dinner stop
food.description: Local cuisine card for a comfortable evening stop with Karakalpak and Uzbek dishes.

food.title: Bazaar tasting route
food.description: A more casual market-focused food experience for quick tasting and local atmosphere.
food.meta: Best combined with a walking route

tours.title: Nukus highlights tour
tours.description: Museum, market, and culture stops packaged into a smooth city itinerary for a polished demo experience.

tours.title: Nukus to fortress route
tours.description: A city-plus-road-trip concept for visitors who want one urban day and one archaeological extension.

moynaq.name: Moynaq
moynaq.summary: Ekologik tarix, keskin manzaralar va hududning ramziy joylariga qiziqadigan sayohatchilar uchun kuchli manzil.
moynaq.overview: Moynaq kuchli hikoya va vizual ta'sirni birlashtirib, tarixga qiziqqan mehmonlar uchun jozibali manzilga aylanadi.

stays.title: Aralkum Guest House
stays.description: A small demo stay concept close to the main attraction area, designed for overnight visitors.

stays.title: Sea Story Lodge
stays.description: An atmospheric lodging concept for travelers coming specifically for the Aral Sea narrative.

guides.title: Ship cemetery guide
guides.description: A local guide concept focused on the historical and environmental story behind the site.

guides.title: Moynaq local companion
guides.description: Adds context, logistics support, and local perspective to a remote day trip.

food.title: Regional comfort cafe
food.description: A practical stop for travelers combining the ship cemetery and museum in one route.

food.title: Tea and local snacks
food.description: A lighter food stop concept for short visits and photography-led itineraries.

tours.title: Aral Sea memory route
tours.description: Combines the ship cemetery, museum, and historical explanation into one memorable visitor journey.

tours.title: Remote photography run
tours.description: A more visual route focused on landscape views, dramatic sites, and time for photo stops.

ellikqala.name: Ellikqala
ellikqala.summary: Qadimiy qal'alar, cho'l manzaralari va road trip kayfiyati Ellikqalani hududdagi eng yaxshi sarguzasht manzillaridan biriga aylantiradi.
ellikqala.overview: Ellikqala arxeologik joylar va ochiq manzaralar atrofida yanada kino uslubidagi marshrut istaydigan sayohatchilar uchun juda mos.

stays.title: Fortress Camp Stay
stays.description: A road-trip lodging concept designed around early starts and open-air exploration.

stays.title: Heritage Base Camp
stays.description: A comfortable overnight option for travelers combining several fortress stops in one trip.

guides.title: Fortress route guide
guides.description: Helps connect archaeological context with the dramatic setting of Ellikqala's historic sites.

guides.title: Desert road companion
guides.description: A practical guide concept for travelers who want a smoother, safer remote excursion.

food.title: Roadside lunch stop
food.description: A simple route support option for fortress visitors spending most of the day outdoors.

food.title: Camp-style dinner
food.description: A more atmospheric experience card for groups who want a stronger desert travel vibe.

tours.title: Ayaz Kala adventure circuit
tours.description: A scenic multi-stop route built around fortress views and time on location.

tours.title: Ancient Khorezm route
tours.description: A more educational route concept connecting major ruins into one clear visitor experience.

aral-sea-region.name: Orol dengizi hududi
aral-sea-region.summary: Katta ko'lam izlaydigan sayohatchilar uchun Moynaq va yaqin uzoq nuqtalarni bitta manzil hikoyasiga birlashtiradigan hududiy sayohat.
aral-sea-region.overview: Orol dengizi hududi keskin ekologik tarix, uzoq go'zallik va esda qoladigan vizual hikoyachilik haqida.

stays.title: Regional explorer lodge
stays.description: A flexible base concept for visitors combining Moynaq with wider Aral Sea region stops.

stays.title: Desert horizon camp
stays.description: A more atmospheric stay concept for travelers who want a landscape-driven itinerary.

guides.title: Regional nature guide
guides.description: Adds local context and route confidence to a wider Aral Sea region itinerary.

guides.title: Photography route host
guides.description: Designed for travelers prioritizing dramatic viewpoints and longer visual stops.

food.title: Regional rest stop
food.description: A practical meal stop concept for travelers moving between remote sights.

food.title: Campfire-style dinner
food.description: A demo cultural dining experience to make remote travel feel warmer and more memorable.
